title: Güelcom tu Colombia
overview: Rogelio, teacher Alba Luz, and Father Alberto try to build a new school in their neighborhood by organizing the first “Tejolympics,” an international tejo tournament. However, things get complicated when undercover CIA agents and a corrupt mayor get involved, putting the project at risk. Only the unity of the community can save their cause.
